title: Health Display Remastered
body:
### If you find any bugs please report them here ==> [Bug Report](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScT5R8IVlWU_ueSXchdSMkPnv_SI8Z_f0Aezz_RM_4S0O0ZDA/viewform?usp=sf_link) ## This pack is originally a feature from my Era of Magic data pack but now it's a standalone data pack for people who just want to see a mob's health. It also adds a damage indicatorwhich you can toggle on and off in the config which you can open with the command: **/function health_disp_r:config** **Before removing the data pack from your world run: */function health_disp_r:uninstall***
When uninstalling all health displays get removed but named mobs keep their name. If there are any bugs or things that look not normal please tell me and I'll fix them.
